untranslatable_reason: Pattern formation (Ascending Broadening Wedge) detection requires multi-bar swing point analysis and wedge geometry calculation not available in allowed indicator set. The signal specifies visual pattern structure with expanding highs and lows that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Translated breakout direction logic only: upward breakout when close > prev_high (entry_long), downward breakout when close < prev_low (entry_short). Exit conditions use reversal logic per rule 8. Recovery target of 49% after ultimate low and 38% average rise noted in parameters but cannot be implemented as target conditions without pattern detection. Bull/bear market context should be enforced via regime filters. Break-even failure rates (2% bull, 11% downward) suggest tight stop-loss; set conservatively at 5%.
